## News


# Mr Scott Greaves Carré (Date of Birth 7 July 1968) of La Sergentee Cottage, Route du Cobo, Castel, Guernsey, GY5 7RU

- Prohibitions
Date of prohibition order pursuant to section 33 of The Financial Services Business (Enforcement Powers) (Bailiwick of Guernsey) Law, 2020 and prohibited functions:
From 25 June 2025 until 25 June 2032:  holding a supervised role.
